title: Sky Is Lava
description: A mod that adds lava to the sky
body:
## This mod adds lava to the sky for a challenge

### Warning: this mod will be laggy on lower end systems

- Adds a randomized lava layer in the sky
- Configurable maximum lava depth
- Supports the Overworld, Nether, and End
- Optional lava ticking/fire behavior
- Optional lava shadows
- Optional lava light emission
- In-game config screen with Mod Menu + Cloth Config
- Built for both Minecraft `1.21.11` and `26.1.2`

## Configuration

### Lava Depth
> Controls the maximum randomized depth of the lava layer.

### Lava Ticking (Performance)
> Toggles lava fluid ticking and random fire checks.

### Lava Casts Shadow (Performance)
> Toggles whether lava blocks sunlight, also allows hostile mobs to spawn.

### lavaEmitsLight (Performance)
> Toggles whether lava emits block light.


## Dependencies

Required:

  • Fabric Loader
  • Fabric API

Optional:

  • Mod Menu
  • Cloth Config API

## This mod was vibecoded and was made for this video
